name: TTM Technologies, Inc.
description: TTM Technologies, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of technology products, including mission systems, radio frequency (RF) components, RF microwave/microelectronic assemblies, and technologically advanced interconnect products such as printed circuit boards (PCBs) and substrates. Headquartered in Santa Ana, California, the company serves a diverse range of markets, including aerospace and defense, automotive, data center computing, industrial and instrumentation, medical, and networking. As one of the largest PCB manufacturers in the world, TTM provides critical engineering and manufacturing solutions that support complex, high-reliability electronic applications for customers across the globe.
